info.name: Community
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation collection for Community backend. Uses {{baseUrl}} and auto-saves accessToken after successful login.

variable.description: Backend base URL. Update for Render/prod when needed.
JWT saved automatically from login response test script.

item.name: Health
item.description: Service health endpoints for uptime checks.

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns basic health status used to verify service is reachable.
Public endpoint intended for Render health checks. Configure Render Health Check Path as /health.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Login request auto-saves token.

request.description:
Creates a user and returns JWT access token.

Validation rules:
- name: required string, min 2, max 50
- email: required valid email
- password: required string, min 3, max 100

response.name: 400 - Validation Error

request.description:
Authenticates user and returns JWT access token.

Validation rules:
- email: required valid email
- password: required string, min 3, max 100

Postman test script automatically saves token to collection/environment variable accessToken.

exec: try { data = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { data = null; }

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns active consent documents (sorted by createdAt ascending).

Requires Bearer token.

At least one strategy should be provided:
- acceptAll: true
- acceptRequired: true
- consentItemIds: [UUID, ...]

Important: required consent items must all be accepted, otherwise API returns error.

response.name: 400 - Missing Required Consent

item.name: Enrollment
item.description: Enrollment lifecycle APIs: start, step upserts, and final submission.

request.description: Requires Bearer token. Creates enrollment in DRAFT state with 4 steps, or returns existing DRAFT enrollment.

Requires Bearer token and accepted consent.
Updates personal/contact/address info and marks step 1 completed.

Enums used:
- gender: MALE | FEMALE | NON_BINARY | TWO_SPIRIT | SELF_DESCRIBE | PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY | OTHER
- phoneType: MOBILE | HOME | WORK
- maritalStatus: SINGLE | MARRIED | DIVORCED | WIDOWED
Requires Bearer token. Returns saved step 1 data. Fails if step 1 is not marked completed.

response.name: 200 - Step 1 Data

request.description:
Requires Bearer token and accepted consent.
Synchronizes maternalLineages list: creates new, updates with id, deletes missing ids.

Enums used:
- relation: MOTHER | GRANDMOTHER | GREAT_GRANDMOTHER | GREAT_GREAT_GRANDMOTHER | GREAT_GREAT_GREAT_GRANDMOTHER
- livingStatus: LIVING | DECEASED

response.name: 400 - Validation Error

request.description: Requires Bearer token and accepted consent. Deletes a single maternal lineage by id for current user enrollment.
Requires Bearer token. Returns saved maternal lineage array once step 2 is completed.
Requires Bearer token. Returns active selectable cultural connections (keys + descriptions).
Requires Bearer token and accepted consent. Accepts selected culturalConnectionKeys and marks step 3 completed.
Requires Bearer token. Returns selected cultural connection keys once step 3 is completed.

Requires Bearer token and accepted consent.
Validates required docs and marks step 4 completed.
Required document types: USER_PHOTO and BIRTH_CERTIFICATE.

Requires Bearer token and accepted consent guard.
Completes enrollment only when all 4 steps are completed and all required consents are accepted.
Sets status to SUBMITTED.

response.name: 400 - Incomplete Steps

item.name: Document
item.description: Document upload/list/delete APIs. These routes require JWT + consent accepted + editable DRAFT enrollment.

request.description: Single-file type. Uploading again replaces existing USER_PHOTO for enrollment.

response.name: 400 - Invalid File/Type
403 - Enrollment Not Editable / Consent Not Accepted

request.description: Single-file type. Uploading again replaces existing BIRTH_CERTIFICATE for enrollment.

response.name: 400 - Invalid File/Type
403 - Enrollment Not Editable / Consent Not Accepted

request.description: Multi-file type. Each upload creates a new record.

response.name: 400 - Invalid File/Type
403 - Enrollment Not Editable / Consent Not Accepted

request.description: Multi-file type. Each upload creates a new record.

response.name: 400 - Invalid File/Type
403 - Enrollment Not Editable / Consent Not Accepted

request.description: Multi-file type. Each upload creates a new record.

response.name: 400 - Invalid File/Type
403 - Enrollment Not Editable / Consent Not Accepted

request.description: Returns normalized document groups for all document types. For single-file types, documents is null or object. For multi-file types, documents is array.

item.name: Account

request.description: Returns user summary + enrollment summary + derived flags.

response.name: 200 - Account Info

item.name: Profile
item.description: Profile endpoint with extended enrollment and regional members.

request.description: Returns detailed profile payload including enrollment, steps, and regionalMembers list based on current zip code.

response.name: 200 - Profile Data
